folksonomy.title: Injini yeFolksonomy
folksonomy.subtitle: Keys Explorer
folksonomy.description: I-Folksonomy ivumela abasebenzisi ukuthi bengeze omaka ngokwezifiso emikhiqizweni. Phequlula bonke okhiye abatholakalayo ngezansi, sesha okhiye abathile, noma chofoza noma yimuphi ukhiye ukuze ubone imikhiqizo ewusebenzisayo.
folksonomy.progress_bar: Usage frequency indicator: {percent}% relative to other keys

key_visualization_guide.title: Key Visualization Guide:
key_visualization_guide.badge_products_end: shows the number of products using this key
key_visualization_guide.badge_values_end: shows the number of unique values for this key
key_visualization_guide.progress_bar: The progress bar represents how commonly the key is used relative to other keys

folksonomy.no_keys_available: No Folksonomy keys available. Keys will appear here once they are created.
folksonomy.no_keys_found: No keys found with the current search query.

home.intro_1: Open Food Facts Explorer iyithuluzi lokuhlola isizindalwazi se-Open Food Facts.
home.intro_2: Ungafaka ikhodi yomkhiqizo kubha yokusesha ngenhla ukuze uqalise noma uchofoze omunye wemikhiqizo engezansi.

preferences.title: Edit your preferences
preferences.subtitle: Your preferences are kept in your browser and never sent to Open Food Facts or anyone else.
preferences.classify_products: Classify products according to your preferences
preferences.classify_products_desc: Enable personalized product classification based on your preferences.

folksonomy.footer_after: . Don't hesitate to participate or give feedback.

datasources.title: Imithombo Yedatha
datasources.last_modified_t: Ukuhlela kokugcina kwekhasi lomkhiqizo ngo- {date} ngo
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

info.images: Layisha izithombe ezicacile zomkhiqizo, izithako, namaqiniso okudla ukuze usize abanye bakhombe umkhiqizo.
info.basic_info: Nikeza imininingwane eyinhloko ngomkhiqizo, njengobuningi, ukupakishwa, nomkhiqizi.
info.origin_traceability: Provide origin and traceability information, such as manufacturing places, origins of ingredients, and traceability codes.
info.languages: Engeza amagama emikhiqizo nezincazelo ngezilimi ezahlukene ukuze wenze umkhiqizo ufinyeleleke kubasebenzisi abaningi.
info.ingredients: Bhala zonke izithako ezikhona emkhiqizweni. Lokhu kusiza abasebenzisi abane-allergies noma izintandokazi zokudla.
info.nutrition: Faka amanani omsoco nge-100g/ml ngayinye njengoba kukhonjisiwe ephaketheni. Lokhu kusiza abasebenzisi ukuqhathanisa imikhiqizo.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: Ongakukhetha, engeza amazwana ukuze uchaze izinguquko zakho noma unikeze umongo owengeziwe.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Leli nani lisiza ukwenza izibalo ezilinganayo zomsoco ngamunye ngosayizi wokuphakelwa. Isibonelo, 60 g, 60g noma 60 G (khetha eyokuqala), 1000 ml noma 1L
tooltips.ingredients_list: Gcina uhlelo lokuqala. Khombisa iphesenti uma lishiwo. Hlukanisa nge-comma noma i-hyphen bese usebenzisa ama-bracket ezithako zesithako.
tooltips.categories: Khomba kuphela isigaba esiqondile kakhulu. Izigaba zabazali zizongezwa ngokuzenzakalelayo. Isibonelo, 'Amasardine emafutheni omnqumo', 'Ijusi yewolintshi evela ku-concentrate'.
tooltips.product_name: Igama lomkhiqizo yigama eliyinhloko eliphrintiwe ephaketheni. Kungaba wuphawu lokuhweba olubhalisiwe. Isibonelo, 'Nesquik', 'Tomato Ketchup'. Ungafaki uphawu egameni
tooltips.brand_name: Faka zonke izinhlobo zomkhiqizo. Ibhrendi eyinhloko, ngokuvamile ekhonjiswa ngokucacile ephaketheni langaphambili, kufanele ifakwe kuqala. Isibonelo, 'Nutella,' Oreo, Mondelez'
tooltips.quantity: Kopisha inani elikhonjisiwe kumkhiqizo futhi ungakhohlwa amayunithi. Isibonelo, 230g, 6 (kumaqanda angu-6), 3 x 150g (ngomkhiqizo onamabhokisi angu-3, ngalinye lika-150g).
tooltips.labels: Noma yisiphi isici somkhiqizo **okuyiqiniso** futhi esihlukile kwezinye izinkambu. Isibonelo, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Made in Belgium, produced in Brittany…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Faka isitolo lapho uthenge khona umkhiqizo. Isibonelo, 'Carrefour', 'Walmart', 'Lidl'.
tooltips.origins: Engeza noma yiziphi izinkomba zemvelaphi ongayithola ephaketheni. Akufanele ukhathazeke ngemvelaphi ekhonjiswe ngokuqondile ohlwini lwesithako. Isibonelo, 'Inyama yenkomo yase-Argentina', 'Isoya ayiveli ku-European Union'.
tooltips.traceability_code: Kulesi sigaba, ungafaka amakhodi ahlobene namamaki okupakisha, izimpawu zokuhlonza noma izimpawu zezempilo.
tooltips.countries: Amazwe lapho umkhiqizo utholakala khona kabanzi (zingafaki izitolo ezisebenza ngemikhiqizo yangaphandle).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.
tooltips.allergens: List the allergens present in the product (e.g. Milk, Gluten, Eggs).
tooltips.traces: List any traces of allergens that may be present due to cross-contamination (e.g. Nuts, Soy).

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.name: Igama

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Faka inani lamayunithi okupakisha anesimo esifanayo kanye nezinto eziqukethwe kumkhiqizo.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Faka igama lesimo elibhalwe emiyalweni yokuvuselela uma litholakala, noma khetha isimo.
packaging_component.material_desc: Faka into ethile uma ingatholakala (ikhodi yezinto ezingaphakathi kukanxantathu ingatholakala ezingxenyeni zokupakisha), noma into ejwayelekile (isibonelo ipulasitiki noma insimbi) uma ungaqiniseki.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Faka imiyalelo yokuvuselela kuphela uma ibhalwe kumkhiqizo.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Faka isisindo esiphelele noma ivolumu ehlanzekile bese ukhombisa iyunithi (isibonelo g noma ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer

missing_number.desc: Serving size should include a numeric value. Examples: {examples}

missing_unit.title: Serving size is missing a unit
missing_unit.desc: Serving size should include a unit. Examples: {examples}

unknown_unit.title: Serving size unit may be incorrect
unknown_unit.desc: Serving size should include a common unit. Examples: {examples}

edit.legal_warning_photos_1: Ungalayishi izithombe okungezona ezakho noma ongenawo amalungelo azo. Ukulayisha izithombe ezine-copyright ngaphandle kwemvume akukho emthethweni futhi kungaholela ekumisweni kwe-akhawunti yakho.
edit.legal_warning_photos_2: Layisha kuphela izithombe zakho noma lezo onemvume ecacile yokuzisebenzisa.

qr.barcode_scanned_not_found: Ibhakhodi engu- {barcode} iskenwe ngempumelelo, kodwa awukho umkhiqizo otholakele kokuthi Open Food Facts, Open Beauty Facts, Open Products Facts noma Open Pet Food Facts.

network.title: Iphutha Lokuxhuma
network.message: Yehlulekile ukuxhuma kuseva ye-Open Food Facts. Sicela uhlole uxhumano lwakho lwe-inthanethi bese uzama futhi.
network.instructions: Uma inkinga iqhubeka, vakashela Ikhasi Lesimo Se-Open Food Facts.

facets.facet_website_description: Zitholele isigaba esingu- {facet} ku-Open Food Facts Explorer.
facets.facet_value_website_description: Zitholele isigaba esingu- {value} ku-Open Food Facts Explorer.

landing.title: Vula i-Food Facts Explorer
landing.subtitle: Isizindalwazi esisebenzisanayo, samahhala nesivulekile semikhiqizo yokudla evela emhlabeni wonke. Zitholele, sesha, futhi ufake isandla ekukhanyeni kokudla kwawo wonke umuntu.
landing.explore_products_desc: Phequlula izigidi zemikhiqizo yokudla, bona amaqiniso okudla, futhi wenze izinqumo ezinolwazi.
landing.help_improve_desc: Help us improve Open Food Facts by editing or answering questions about these products.

dashboard.html_title: Iphrofayela Yomsebenzisi - {user} - Vula Isihloli Sokudla Kwamaqiniso
dashboard.title: Iphrofayela yomsebenzisi ye- {user}

explore.title: Hlola amaqiniso okudla okuvulekile
explore.subtitle: Zitholele imikhiqizo ethrendayo, izigaba ezidumile, futhi ufake isandla ekwazisweni obala kokudla!
explore.trending_products_desc: Bona ukuthi yimiphi imikhiqizo ebukwayo nehlelwa kakhulu njengamanje.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Phequlula izigaba zokudla ezaziwa kakhulu kusizindalwazi sethu.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Siza ukuthuthukisa amaqiniso okudla okuvulekile ngokungeza noma ukuhlela imikhiqizo, noma ukuphendula imibuzo.
explore.random_product_desc: Uzizwa unenhlanhla? Zitholele umkhiqizo ongahleliwe kusizindalwazi sethu.
explore.learn_more_desc: Thola ukuthi i-Open Food Facts isebenza kanjani nokuthi ungasiza kanjani.
